title: Evangelion Doujinshi w out hentai
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Doujinshi (w/out hentai)             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Fri Nov 17, 2006 6:45 pm Ok, I've been a fan of Evangelion for a while now, and I've seen the shows, and I've seen the movies, and I've read the manga, and I've read the other mangas, and I've hear the audio commentary... *goes on for a while* ...Girlfriend of Steel 1 and 2, but for some reason, I've never been able to find any doujinshi EVA related that doesn't focus on the sex. There's RE-TAKE, which has to be one of the finer doujinshi I've seen overall, but even looking for that was an extremely nerve-testing process, and the only reason I even knew about that was because how well done it has been mentioned as. Any doujin site that I go to for looking for it has only led me to hentai, and I REALLY don't want to discuss half of what I saw in those. So I guess the purpose of this thread is to list Evangelion doujinshi that you feel is either worth a look, or is one of the greater pieces you've ever read. Also, perhaps posting links to doujin sites where the term "EVA Launch!" isn't considered a sexual inuendo. My choice is obvious, seeing as it's the only one I've read, RE-TAKE. It does an excellent job of extending the ending of the original series, and seems to do as much of a psychology job on your head as the real thing. Plus, the blatant sex scenes actually serve a purpose in furthering the storyline!

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Nov 17, 2006 7:17 pm Only one I can think of is Ayanami's Fans , which is funny but really short. The Monkey has it somewhere on his site, I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Nov 17, 2006 8:50 pm doujin w/o hentai? what kind of world do we live in?!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 17, 2006 9:54 pm These aren't exactly doujinshi, but enjoy. Ayanami's Fans: If Shinji Had a Spine: (you may have to save this one and increase the size)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 17, 2006 11:57 pm If Shinji Had A Spine, I Would Snap Him Over My Knee. Yeah, there are actually some doujin out there that either don't revolve around sex or don't include it at all. Amazing. Paging through doujinshi tends to be a gamble ("okay, how long before this seemingly innocent setup turns dirty...?"). For SOME reason, these types of doujin tend to be hard to find on the Internets. I mean, doujinshi just isn't worth scanning unless there are giant, pulsating man/dickgirl-rods going into orifices and sticky passion-fluids exploding this way and that way. Adolescent girls being raped (preferably multiple times over by multiple people in every available orifice) = BONUS. I don't know my doujinshi folder very well, but I hold a great deal of respect for D-Cup Hunter. It's ecchi, but about the worst things get are Misato and Kaji attempting to get it on in public (hint: BEER) and Asuka ripping women's fronts open. (Errr... hard to explain.)

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Nov 18, 2006 3:21 am And something I think Reichu would like:

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Nov 18, 2006 3:25 pm does this count?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 18, 2006 3:28 pm Ornette wrote: does this count?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 18, 2006 3:42 pm MaggotMaster wrote: http://img139.imageshack.us/img139/6136/lolwut3vp5.gif

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 18, 2006 4:03 pm Reichu wrote: There's at least one more by the same artist (who I really want to know the identity of), which has all of the named kids from 2-A swapping sexes. So wrong, but so great.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sat Nov 18, 2006 4:17 pm Ayanami's Fans was by the mangaka of two of the mangas I read: Kiyohiko Azuma.

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Thu Nov 23, 2006 12:21 am What is this retake I keep hearing about???

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Thu Nov 23, 2006 12:36 am MaggotMaster wrote: And something I think Reichu would like:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 23, 2006 12:53 am master0rolando wrote: omg! sauce!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Nov 23, 2006 2:17 am BLACKANGEL32076 wrote: What is this retake I keep hearing about???

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Nov 23, 2006 4:33 am Mr. Tines wrote: [...] But its agenda is unfortunately to strive for an explicit A/S resolution.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Thu Nov 23, 2006 10:27 am Mr. Tines wrote: BLACKANGEL32076 wrote: What is this retake I keep hearing about???

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 23, 2006 1:17 pm Retake is basically a Shinji/Asuka H-romance about post-3I Shinji going back in time after the events of episode 16 and trying to change the past for the better (such as being on better terms with the past Asuka ;) ) when post-3I Asuka soon shows up, bitter at him for his not saving her during the Harpies battle (though she still has feelings for him, despite not wanting to admit it). Anything else about the plot, you have to read the doujinshi and find out yourself. :mrgreen: The sex content is defitanly of the H-variety, but it's tastefully done and acutally has a purpose: it drives the plot. I highly recommend it because even if you're not a Shinji/Asuka fan, Retake has the mind-fuck qualities of the orginal series to it.
